{{Quote|Your plan worked, Kam. Good thing you were in the ''Jedi Explorer II'' with us!|Rayf Ysanna to Kam Solusar|<ref name="Empire's End 1">[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''''Jedi Explorer II''''' was a personal starship built by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to replace his former ''[[Jedi Explorer]]''. He used it during the end of [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]
